name: tdd-patterns
description: Test-driven development techniques grounded in Kent Beck's *Test-Driven Development By Example*. Process patterns (fake-it, triangulate, obvious implementation, one-step test, child test), test design patterns (isolation, mocks, learning tests, regression tests), and a TDD anti-pattern catalog. Complements Superpowers' `test-driven-development` workflow skill with the specific *techniques within* TDD.
